name: Next Day Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooked rice in a microwave or double boiler with some raisins and sugar to taste.
2. Stir in half and half gradually until the rice has absorbed some liquid and is warm and creamy.
3. Taste for sweetness, then dust with a sprinkling of ground cinnamon, fresh raspberries, or sliced seedless grapes.
(Note: The attribution line and date have been removed as per the instructions.)
